manifestBlobs.cluster|configmap|crowd-helm-values:
# Source: crowd/templates/configmap-values-analytics.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: crowd-helm-values
  labels:
    helm.sh/chart: crowd-2.0.13
    app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "7.1.5"
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    
data:
  values.yaml: |
    additionalConfigMaps: []
    additionalContainers: []
    additionalFiles: []
    additionalHosts: []
    additionalInitContainers: []
    additionalLabels: {}
    affinity: {}
    atlassianAnalyticsAndSupport:
      analytics:
        enabled: true
      helmValues:
        enabled: true
    common:
      global: {}
    crowd:
      accessLog:
        enabled: true
        localHomeSubPath: logs
        mountPath: /opt/atlassian/crowd/apache-tomcat/logs
      additionalAnnotations: {}
      additionalBundledPlugins: []
      additionalCertificates:
        customCmd: null
        initContainer:
          resources: {}
          securityContext: {}
        secretList: []
        secretName: null
      additionalEnvironmentVariables: []
      additionalJvmArgs: []
      additionalLibraries: []
      additionalPorts: []
      additionalVolumeClaimTemplates: []
      additionalVolumeMounts: []
      containerSecurityContext:
        allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
        capabilities:
          drop:
          - ALL
        runAsGroup: 2004
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 2004
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      livenessProbe:
        customProbe: {}
        enabled: false
        failureThreshold: 12
        initialDelaySeconds: 60
        periodSeconds: 5
        timeoutSeconds: 1
      ports:
        http: 8095
      postStart:
        command: null
      readinessProbe:
        customProbe: {}
        enabled: false
        failureThreshold: 10
        initialDelaySeconds: 10
        periodSeconds: 5
        timeoutSeconds: 1
      resources:
        container:
          requests:
            cpu: "2"
            memory: 1G
        jvm:
          maxHeap: 768m
          minHeap: 384m
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 2004
        fsGroupChangePolicy: OnRootMismatch
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      securityContextEnabled: true
      service:
        annotations: {}
        contextPath: /crowd
        loadBalancerIP: null
        nodePort: 31084
        port: 80
        sessionAffinity: None
        sessionAffinityConfig:
          clientIP:
            timeoutSeconds: null
        type: NodePort
      setPermissions: true
      shutdown:
        command: /shutdown-wait.sh
        terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      startupProbe:
        enabled: false
        failureThreshold: 120
        initialDelaySeconds: 60
        periodSeconds: 5
      tomcatConfig:
        acceptCount: "100"
        accessLogsMaxDays: "-1"
        connectionTimeout: "20000"
        enableLookups: "false"
        generateByHelm: false
        maxHttpHeaderSize: "8192"
        maxThreads: "150"
        mgmtPort: "8020"
        minSpareThreads: "25"
        port: "8095"
        protocol: HTTP/1.1
        proxyInternalIps: null
        proxyName: null
        proxyPort: null
        redirectPort: "8443"
        requestAttributesEnabled: "false"
        scheme: null
        secure: null
      topologySpreadConstraints: []
      umask: "0022"
      useHelmReleaseNameAsContainerName: false
    database:
      credentials:
        secretName: crowd-db-credentials
      type: postgresql
      url: jdbc:postgresql://crowd-db:5432/crowd
    fluentd:
      command: null
      customConfigFile: false
      elasticsearch:
        enabled: true
        hostname: elasticsearch
        indexNamePrefix: crowd
      enabled: false
      extraVolumes: []
      fluentdCustomConfig: {}
      httpPort: 9880
      imageRepo: fluent/fluentd-kubernetes-daemonset
      imageTag: v1.11.5-debian-elasticsearch7-1.2
      resources: {}
    gateway:
      additionalRules: []
      annotations: {}
      create: false
      externalPort: 31084
      filters: []
      hostnames:
      - 91.206.14.44
      https: false
      labels: {}
      parentRefs: []
      path: /crowd
      pathType: PathPrefix
      timeouts:
        backendRequest: 60s
        request: 60s
    hostNamespaces: {}
    image:
      pullPolicy: IfNotPresent
      repository: torque.local/atlassian/crowd
      tag: 7.1.5-custom-20260510
    ingress:
      additionalPaths: []
      annotations: {}
      className: nginx
      create: false
      host: null
      https: true
      maxBodySize: 250m
      nginx: true
      openShiftRoute: false
      path: /
      proxyConnectTimeout: 60
      proxyReadTimeout: 60
      proxySendTimeout: 60
      routeHttpHeaders: {}
      tlsSecretName: null
    monitoring:
      exposeJmxMetrics: false
      fetchJmxExporterJar: true
      grafana:
        createDashboards: false
        dashboardAnnotations: {}
        dashboardLabels: {}
      jmxExporterCustomConfig: {}
      jmxExporterCustomJarLocation: null
      jmxExporterImageRepo: bitnamilegacy/jmx-exporter
      jmxExporterImageTag: 0.18.0
      jmxExporterInitContainer:
        customSecurityContext: {}
        jmxJarLocation: null
        resources: {}
        runAsRoot: true
      jmxExporterPort: 9999
      jmxExporterPortType: ClusterIP
      jmxServiceAnnotations: {}
      serviceMonitor:
        create: false
        prometheusLabelSelector: {}
        scrapeIntervalSeconds: 30
    nodeSelector: {}
    openshift:
      runWithRestrictedSCC: false
    ordinals:
      enabled: false
      start: 0
    podAnnotations: {}
    podDisruptionBudget:
      annotations: {}
      enabled: false
      labels: {}
      maxUnavailable: null
      minAvailable: null
    podLabels: {}
    replicaCount: 1
    serviceAccount:
      annotations: {}
      create: true
      imagePullSecrets: []
      name: null
    terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
    testPods:
      affinity: {}
      annotations: {}
      image:
        permissionsTestContainer: debian:stable-slim
        statusTestContainer: alpine:latest
      labels: {}
      nodeSelector: {}
      resources: {}
      schedulerName: null
      tolerations: []
    tolerations: []
    updateStrategy: {}
    volumes:
      additional: []
      localHome:
        customVolume: {}
        mountPath: /var/atlassian/application-data/crowd
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          create: true
          resources:
            requests:
              storage: 10Gi
          storageClassName: local-path
        persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
          whenDeleted: null
          whenScaled: null
        subPath: null
      sharedHome:
        customVolume: {}
        mountPath: /var/atlassian/application-data/crowd/shared
        nfsPermissionFixer:
          command: null
          enabled: false
          imageRepo: alpine
          imageTag: latest
          mountPath: /shared-home
          resources: {}
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          accessModes:
          - ReadWriteMany
          create: true
          resources:
            requests:
              storage: 10Gi
          storageClassName: nfs-client
        subPath: null
  analytics.json: |
    
    {
      "imageTag": "7.1.5",
      "replicas": 1,
      "isJmxEnabled": false,
      "ingressType": "NONE",
      "k8sVersion": "1.20",
      "serviceType": "NODE_PORT",
      "dbType": "UNKNOWN",
      "isSharedHomePVCCreated": true,
      "isServiceMonitorCreated": false,
      "isGrafanaDashboardsCreated": false,
      "isRunOnOpenshift": false,
      "isRunWithRestrictedSCC": false,
      "isOpenshiftRouteCreated": false
    }
manifestBlobs.cluster|configmap|crowd-jvm-config:
# Source: crowd/templates/config-jvm.yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: crowd-jvm-config
  labels:
    helm.sh/chart: crowd-2.0.13
    app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "7.1.5"
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    
data:
  additional_jvm_args: >-
    -Dcluster.node.name=${KUBE_POD_NAME}
    -Datlassian.logging.cloud.enabled=false
    -XX:ActiveProcessorCount=2
  max_heap: 768m
  min_heap: 384m

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: crowd-shared-home

    helm.sh/chart: crowd-2.0.13
    app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "7.1.5"

spec:
  accessModes:
  
    - ReadWriteMany
  
  storageClassName: "nfs-client"

      storage: 10Gi

manifestBlobs.cluster|statefulset|crowd:
# Source: crowd/templates/statefulset.yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: crowd
  labels:
    helm.sh/chart: crowd-2.0.13
    app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/version: "7.1.5"
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    
  annotations:
spec:
  
  replicas: 1
  serviceName: crowd
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        checksum/config-jvm: 8b1df8f8a75b0a3ad60fdf03b7a11dc04d0e56d940812ad18c2f0cbce5c8cfb6
        
      labels:
        helm.sh/chart: crowd-2.0.13
        app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
        app.kubernetes.io/version: "7.1.5"
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
        
        
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: crowd
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      hostAliases:
        
      securityContext:
        
        fsGroup: 2004
        fsGroupChangePolicy: OnRootMismatch
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      initContainers:
        
        
      containers:
        - name: crowd
          image: "torque.local/atlassian/crowd:7.1.5-custom-20260510"
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8095
              protocol: TCP
            
            
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
              - ALL
            runAsGroup: 2004
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 2004
            seccompProfile:
              type: RuntimeDefault
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "2"
              memory: 1G
          volumeMounts:
            
            - name: local-home
              mountPath: "/var/atlassian/application-data/crowd"
            - name: local-home
              mountPath: "/opt/atlassian/crowd/apache-tomcat/logs"
              subPath: "logs"
            - name: shared-home
              mountPath: "/var/atlassian/application-data/crowd/shared"
            - name: helm-values
              mountPath: /opt/atlassian/helm
            
            
            
            
          env:
            - name: KUBE_POD_NAME
              valueFrom:
                fieldRef:
                  fieldPath: metadata.name
            
            
            - name: ATL_TOMCAT_CONTEXTPATH
              value: "/crowd"
            
            - name: ATL_TOMCAT_PORT
              value: "8095"
            
            - name: ATL_PROXY_NAME
              value: "91.206.14.44"
            - name: ATL_PROXY_PORT
              value: "31084"
            
            - name: ATL_TOMCAT_ACCESS_LOG
              value: "true"
            - name: UMASK
              value: "0022"
            - name: SET_PERMISSIONS
              value: "true"
            - name: ATL_PRODUCT_HOME_SHARED
              value: "/var/atlassian/application-data/crowd/shared"
            - name: JVM_SUPPORT_RECOMMENDED_ARGS
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  key: additional_jvm_args
                  name: crowd-jvm-config
            - name: JVM_MINIMUM_MEMORY
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  key: min_heap
                  name: crowd-jvm-config
            - name: JVM_MAXIMUM_MEMORY
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  key: max_heap
                  name: crowd-jvm-config
            
          lifecycle:
            preStop:
              exec:
                command: ["sh", "-c", "/shutdown-wait.sh"]
        
        
        
      volumes:
        
        
        - name: shared-home
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: crowd-shared-home
        
        - name: helm-values
          configMap:
            name: crowd-helm-values
        
        
        
        
        
        
  
  
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      name: local-home
    spec:
      accessModes: [ "ReadWriteOnce" ]
      storageClassName: "local-path"
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:
    meta.helm.sh/release-name: crowd
    meta.helm.sh/release-namespace: atlassian
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
    app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
    app.kubernetes.io/version: 7.1.5
    helm.sh/chart: crowd-2.0.13
  name: crowd
  namespace: atlassian
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: OrderedReady
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
      app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
  serviceName: crowd
  template:
    metadata:
      annotations:
        checksum/config-jvm: 8b1df8f8a75b0a3ad60fdf03b7a11dc04d0e56d940812ad18c2f0cbce5c8cfb6
      labels:
        app.kubernetes.io/instance: crowd
        app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: Helm
        app.kubernetes.io/name: crowd
        app.kubernetes.io/version: 7.1.5
        helm.sh/chart: crowd-2.0.13
    spec:
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: KUBE_POD_NAME
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              apiVersion: v1
              fieldPath: metadata.name
        - name: ATL_TOMCAT_CONTEXTPATH
          value: /crowd
        - name: ATL_TOMCAT_PORT
          value: "8095"
        - name: ATL_PROXY_NAME
          value: 91.206.14.44
        - name: ATL_PROXY_PORT
          value: "31084"
        - name: ATL_TOMCAT_ACCESS_LOG
          value: "true"
        - name: UMASK
          value: "0022"
        - name: SET_PERMISSIONS
          value: "true"
        - name: ATL_PRODUCT_HOME_SHARED
          value: /var/atlassian/application-data/crowd/shared
        - name: JVM_SUPPORT_RECOMMENDED_ARGS
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              key: additional_jvm_args
              name: crowd-jvm-config
        - name: JVM_MINIMUM_MEMORY
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              key: min_heap
              name: crowd-jvm-config
        - name: JVM_MAXIMUM_MEMORY
          valueFrom:
            configMapKeyRef:
              key: max_heap
              name: crowd-jvm-config
        image: atlassian/crowd:7.1.5
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        lifecycle:
          preStop:
            exec:
              command:
              - sh
              - -c
              - /shutdown-wait.sh
        name: crowd
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8095
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "2"
            memory: 1G
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          runAsGroup: 2004
          runAsNonRoot: true
          runAsUser: 2004
          seccompProfile:
            type: RuntimeDefault
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /var/atlassian/application-data/crowd
          name: local-home
        - mountPath: /opt/atlassian/crowd/apache-tomcat/logs
          name: local-home
          subPath: logs
        - mountPath: /var/atlassian/application-data/crowd/shared
          name: shared-home
        - mountPath: /opt/atlassian/helm
          name: helm-values
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext:
        fsGroup: 2004
        fsGroupChangePolicy: OnRootMismatch
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      serviceAccount: crowd
      serviceAccountName: crowd
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      volumes:
      - name: shared-home
        persistentVolumeClaim:
          claimName: crowd-shared-home
      - configMap:
          defaultMode: 420
          name: crowd-helm-values
        name: helm-values
  updateStrategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      partition: 0
    type: RollingUpdate
  volumeClaimTemplates:
  - apiVersion: v1
    kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
    metadata:
      name: local-home
    spec:
      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      storageClassName: local-path
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending

templateSources.crowd/templates/configmap-jmx-config.yam:
{{- if .Values.monitoring.exposeJmxMetrics }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{ include "common.names.fullname" . }}-jmx-config
  labels:
    {{- include "common.labels.commonLabels" . | nindent 4 }}
data:
  {{- if .Values.monitoring.jmxExporterCustomConfig }}
  jmx-config.yaml: |
  {{- with .Values.monitoring.jmxExporterCustomConfig }}
  {{- toYaml . | nindent 4 }}
  {{- end }}
  {{- else }}
  jmx-config.yaml: |
    rules:
      - pattern: '(java.lang)<type=(\w+)><>(\w+):'
        name: java_lang_$2_$3
        labels:
          product: "crowd"
      - pattern: 'java.lang<type=Memory><HeapMemoryUsage>(\w+)'
        name: java_lang_Memory_HeapMemoryUsage_$1
        labels:
          product: "crowd"
      - pattern: 'java.lang<name=G1 (\w+) Generation, type=GarbageCollector><>(\w+)'
        name: java_lang_G1_$1_Generation_$2
        labels:
          product: "crowd"
      - pattern: '.*'
  {{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{ if or .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.generateByHelm .Values.openshift.runWithRestrictedSCC }}
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: {{ include "common.names.fullname" . }}-server-config
  labels:
    {{- include "common.labels.commonLabels" . | nindent 4 }}
data:
{{- if or .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.generateByHelm .Values.openshift.runWithRestrictedSCC }}
  server.xml: |
{{- if .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.customServerXml }}
{{- .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.customServerXml | nindent 6 }}
{{- else }}
    <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
    <Server port="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.mgmtPort | default "8020" }}"
            shutdown="SHUTDOWN">

      <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.startup.VersionLoggerListener"/>
      <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.core.AprLifecycleListener"
                SSLEngine="on"/>
      <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.core.JreMemoryLeakPreventionListener"/>
      <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.mbeans.GlobalResourcesLifecycleListener"/>
      <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.core.ThreadLocalLeakPreventionListener"/>

      <Service name="Catalina">

        <Connector port="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.port | default "8095" }}"
                   maxThreads="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.maxThreads | default "150" }}"
                   minSpareThreads="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.minSpareThreads | default "25" }}"
                   connectionTimeout="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.connectionTimeout | default "20000" }}"
                   enableLookups="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.enableLookups | default "false" }}"
                   protocol="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.protocol | default "HTTP/1.1" }}"
                   redirectPort="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.redirectPort | default "8443" }}"
                   acceptCount="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.acceptCount | default "100" }}"
                   secure="{{ default (include "common.gateway.https" .) .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.secure }}"
                   scheme="{{ default (include "common.gateway.scheme" .) .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.scheme }}"
                   proxyName="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.proxyName | default (include "common.gateway.hostname" .)  }}"
                   proxyPort="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.proxyPort | default (include "common.gateway.externalPort" .)  }}"
                   maxHttpHeaderSize="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.maxHttpHeaderSize | default "8192" }}"
                   useBodyEncodingForURI="true"
                   URIEncoding="UTF-8"
                   compression="on"
                   sendReasonPhrase="true"
                   compressableMimeType="text/html,text/xml,application/xml,text/plain,text/css,application/json,application/javascript,application/x-javascript" />

        <Engine name="Catalina"
                defaultHost="localhost">

        <Host appBase="webapps" autoDeploy="true" name="localhost" unpackWARs="true">
           <Valve className="org.apache.catalina.valves.ErrorReportValve" showReport="false" showServerInfo="false" />
           <Context path="{{ .Values.crowd.service.contextPath | default "/crowd" }}" docBase="../../crowd-webapp" debug="0">
             <Manager pathname="" />
           </Context>
        </Host>
        {{- if .Values.crowd.accessLog.enabled }}
            <Valve className="org.apache.catalina.valves.AccessLogValve"
                   requestAttributesEnabled="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.requestAttributesEnabled | default "false" }}"
                   directory="logs"
                   prefix="crowd_access"
                   suffix=".log"
                   rotatable="true"
                   pattern="%h %{X-AUSERNAME}o %t "%r" %s %b %D %U %I "%{User-Agent}i""
                   maxDays="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.accessLogsMaxDays | default "-1" }}"/>
            <Valve className="org.apache.catalina.valves.RemoteIpValve"
                   proxiesHeader="x-forwarded-by"
                   {{- if .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.proxyInternalIps }}
                   internalProxies="{{ .Values.crowd.tomcatConfig.proxyInternalIps | replace "." "\\." }}"
                   {{- end }}
                   remoteIpHeader="x-forwarded-for"
                   protocolHeader="x-forwarded-proto"
                   requestAttributesEnabled="true"
                   resolveHosts="false" />
        {{- end }}
        </Engine>

      </Service>
        <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.core.AprLifecycleListener" SSLEngine="on" />
        <!-- Prevent memory leaks due to use of particular java/javax APIs-->
        <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.core.JreMemoryLeakPreventionListener" />
        <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.mbeans.GlobalResourcesLifecycleListener" />
        <Listener className="org.apache.catalina.core.ThreadLocalLeakPreventionListener" />
    </Server>
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
{{ end }}
